items.caption: A scene in a train station. in the foreground, there is a prominent orange and white defibrillator with a sign that reads "notruf" and "defibrillator" in german. the defibrillator is mounted on a pole and has a sticker on it with instructions. in the background, there are several people waiting on the platform, some of whom are carrying backpacks and handbags. the station has a modern design with a high ceiling and artificial lighting. the text "munich, bavaria, germany, europe" suggests the location of the station.
